series_metadata.series_description: The Auditor of State official report on the examination of Auditees pursuant to Chapter 117 O.R.C and other relevant chapters or sections of the Ohio Revised Code. The report usually contains the Auditor of State statement on the work performed, opinion as to the propriety of the financial statements, compliance of the Ohio Revised Code as well as other applicable laws, regulations or rules and management comments. Operational Audits as well as Economy and Efficiency Audits are also included in this series.
